---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement to DINOForge
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Summary

One-line summary of the feature request.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What gap or pain point does it address? Be specific about use cases and user needs.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented. Include:
- High-level approach
- Key design decisions
- Integration points with existing systems

## Acceptance Criteria

How will we know this feature is complete and working correctly?

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Component

Which component(s) would this feature affect?

- [ ] Runtime (BepInEx plugin, ECS bridge)
- [ ] SDK (Registries, ContentLoader, schemas)
- [ ] PackCompiler (Pack compilation, validation)
- [ ] Warfare Domain
- [ ] Economy Domain
- [ ] Scenario Domain
- [ ] UI Domain
- [ ] Installer
- [ ] Desktop Companion
- [ ] MCP Server (Game automation)
- [ ] Documentation / Examples
- [ ] Pack System
- [ ] Other

## Agent Move Class

Which legal operation category does this map to? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#legal-move-classes) for details.

- [ ] **create schema** — New data shape definition (pack manifest, unit, building, etc.)
- [ ] **extend registry** — Add entries to existing registry (units, buildings, factions)
- [ ] **add content pack** — New pack with manifest and assets
- [ ] **patch mapping** — Update vanilla-to-mod component mapping
- [ ] **write validator** — New validation rule or schema check
- [ ] **add test fixture** — New test case or test data
- [ ] **add debug view** — New diagnostic surface or overlay
- [ ] **add migration** — Version compatibility migration
- [ ] **add compatibility rule** — Cross-pack conflict rule
- [ ] **add documentation manifest** — Update docs or guides
- [ ] **other / not sure** — Describe below

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative approaches or designs have you considered? Why is your proposed solution better?

1. Alternative 1 — Pros/cons
2. Alternative 2 — Pros/cons

## Examples / Mockups

Any mockups, code examples, or visual diagrams? Use Mermaid if helpful.

```csharp
// Example code or pseudocode
```

## Additional Context

- [ ] I've checked the roadmap (docs/ROADMAP.md)
- [ ] I've searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] I've reviewed the architecture (CLAUDE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md)

Any other context that might help?
